body:
## Problem
8 genre landing pages exist at `/genre/<slug>` but there are ZERO LLM markdown files for genre content anywhere in `public/llms/`. AI crawlers (ClaudeBot, GPTBot, PerplexityBot) cannot answer "best thrash metal drummers" or "what gear do death metal drummers use" using MetalForge data.

`ls public/llms/genres/` — directory does not exist.

## Files to create (8 new files)
```
public/llms/genres/thrash.md
public/llms/genres/death.md
public/llms/genres/black.md
public/llms/genres/progressive.md
public/llms/genres/nu-metal.md
public/llms/genres/groove.md
public/llms/genres/metalcore.md
public/llms/genres/hardcore.md
```

## Status: already applied
All 8 files exist in `public/llms/genres/` (663–784 words each, 11–13 /drummer/ links each, FAQ sections present). Sitemap entry at api/sitemap.js line 707–708 already references getAllGenreSlugs() for /llms/genres/<slug>.md. /llms/index.md references the genres/ directory. No changes needed.
title: SEO batch: /llms/genres/<slug>.md — 8 genre LLM files for AI citation (~8 files)
